creator: bruce@freebsd.zuhause.org
text: I think that it will be a mistake to replace the existing port structure with a single Maven port.  Maven 3.0.x requires Java 1.5 to run, Maven 3.1.x and 3.2.x require Java 1.6 to run, and Maven 3.3.x requires Java 1.7 to run.  While it is possible to build applications requiring older Java compilers on Maven 3.3.x using toolchains, it may not be desirable/practical to force users to implement toolchain changes to their poms.
